title: Kevlar Drip
description: The Armor Set for those who want something TACTICAL!
body:
![Tital (?)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97cab99244180d7a5e818637a2b88e5e4e7100ff_0.webp)
(a small note, This is my first ever mod... so expect bugs...)
Ever wanted to have some Proper Tactical Drip but you also wanted to use a more Stable Minecraft build with Fabric?

# Then KEVLAR DRIP IS THE MOD FOR YOU!

You get the following :

**. 3 New Items**

**. 6 New 3D Armor Sets with uniqe effects**

**. a Full-On STEALTH system for 3 of the 6 armor sets**

The whole theme of the Items is Kevlar (Dah, it's in the name) which is craftable by using a Flint with 8 strings surrounding it... and your tactical crafting will take off from there...
From making the basic Infantry Set to start with, Hunting Phantoms and craft Kevlar Plates for the Spec Ops set, or even go for the ancient city to craft THE HUNTER Set. Each set uses a mix of In-Mod materials as well as vanilla items that needs more love.

**Important to know!!!**

**The Kevlar Drip Mod NEEDS Geckolib 4.8.4 (or later) to work!
It's the ONE depandenciy it needs!**
